purpose: Document the paper-valid information boundary for issue comments, fixing artifacts, and benchmark hints.

core_policy.target_issue: Use only the original issue title/body. Do not use target-issue follow-up comments.
core_policy.historical_issues_and_prs: Use only titles/descriptions from time-eligible historical issues and pull requests. Do not use comments.
core_policy.benchmark_hint_fields: hint_text and hints_text are treated as unavailable benchmark-only fields and are stripped before localization, KG export, test generation, or repair prompts are built.
core_policy.temporal_cutoff: The target issue created_at timestamp is the cutoff. Other repository artifacts must have timestamps no later than the target issue creation time.
core_policy.target_fixing_pull_request: Do not use the target fixing pull request, its title/body, its patch diff, its merged commit, explicit target fixing PR/issue references from the issue text, or any artifact created after the target issue cutoff.
core_policy.linked_patch_or_commit_expansion: Linked patch files and raw commit hashes in issue text are not expanded in the paper-valid KG construction path.
core_policy.online_artifact_lookup: The main TSE setting admits only target-issue-time-eligible artifact titles/descriptions; comments, benchmark hints, later artifacts, and patch/commit expansion are excluded. KGCOMPASS_OFFLINE_ARTIFACTS=1 is not the main TSE configuration.

why: Issue and pull-request comments can contain maintainer-provided localization hints, even when they predate the target issue. The reported pipeline therefore excludes comments entirely.

code_guard.guard: The target sample created_at value initializes the cutoff, and _check_and_count_artifact_time() rejects every artifact timestamp later than that cutoff.
_get_issue_from_id() sets issue.full_body to issue.body only for every GitHub issue/PR artifact.
Django ticket fallback sets full_content to the ticket description only and does not parse comment divs into the KG text.
custom GitHub issue mode builds the problem statement from issue.title and issue.body only; the former 7-day comment window is removed.
KGCOMPASS_EXPAND_PATCH_LINKS defaults to 0; _process_repository() keeps the original problem_statement instead of expanding linked patches or commit hashes.
_strip_target_fix_references() removes explicit target fixing URLs and PR/issue references from target and related issue text before KG construction.

--evidence-graph applies paper-valid environment defaults including KGCOMPASS_EXPAND_PATCH_LINKS=0, KGCOMPASS_USE_TIMELINE=0, KGCOMPASS_ENABLE_METHOD_CALL_EXPANSION=0, KGCOMPASS_STRICT_IDENTIFIER_FILTER=1, KGCOMPASS_NAME_SEARCH_STRICT=1, and KGCOMPASS_SOURCE_EXTENSIONS=.py. It does not force KGCOMPASS_OFFLINE_ARTIFACTS=1 in the main TSE setting.
--dataset-jsonl local rows and HuggingFace rows are stripped of hint_text/hints_text before evaluation.

The paper-valid retrieval export ranks by deterministic issue-symbol and path-token anchors plus typed graph support/distance; it does not read comments, hint_text/hints_text, embeddings, or edge weights.
BenchmarkManager strips hint_text/hints_text when loading SWE-bench or local benchmark rows.

audit_command: rg -n "hint_text|hints_text|comments excluded|Comment by|discussion comments|EXPAND_PATCH_LINKS|USE_TIMELINE|strip_target_fix_references|target_fix_reference" -S kgcompass mine_kg_bulk.py run_evidence_graph_resume.sh temp_run/run_open_testcase_rounds.py temp_run/run_claudecode_repairs.py temp_run/run_minisweagent_repairs.py temp_run/export_agentless_project_structures.py scripts external/kgcompass-paper
